situations.name: 상황 1 — 식당에서
situations.description: 🎭 🎭 👦 손님(아이) · 👩 직원(웨이터) | 📖 식당에 들어가서 주문하고 계산하는 장면

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.english: Hello! Do you have a table for two?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, we do! Please follow me.

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.english: Thank you. Can I see the menu?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 물론이죠! 오늘의 특별 메뉴도 있어요. 뭘 추천해 드릴까요?
turns.english: Of course! We also have today's special. What can I recommend for you?

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 저는 견과류 알레르기가 있어요. 이 음식에 견과류가 들어 있나요?
turns.english: I'm allergic to nuts. Are there any nuts in this dish?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 아니요, 없어요. 안심하세요! 크림 파스타를 추천해요.
turns.english: No, there aren't. Don't worry! I recommend the cream pasta.

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 좋아요! 크림 파스타 하나, 어린이 피자도 주세요. 피자가 매운가요?
turns.english: Great! One cream pasta, and one kids' pizza please. Is the pizza spicy?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: No, it's not spicy. Would you like it without onions?

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 네, 양파 빼주세요. 오렌지 주스 두 잔이랑 물도 주세요.
turns.english: Yes, no onions please. And two glasses of orange juice and some water too.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Sure! Please wait a moment.

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 저기요! 포크를 떨어뜨렸어요. 냅킨도 더 주실 수 있어요?
turns.english: Excuse me! I dropped my fork. Can I also have more napkins?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: I'm sorry! I'll bring it right away.

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 음식이 좀 차가워요. 데워주실 수 있어요?
turns.english: The food is a little cold. Can you heat it up?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: I'm so sorry! I'll replace it right away.

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 와, 이제 정말 맛있어요! 배가 너무 불러요.
turns.english: Wow, it's really delicious now! I'm so full.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 남은 음식 포장해 드릴까요? 포장 박스 드릴게요.
turns.english: Shall I pack the leftovers for you? I'll bring a to-go box.

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 네, 감사해요! 초콜릿 아이스크림도 디저트로 하나 주세요.
turns.english: Yes, thank you! And one chocolate ice cream for dessert please.

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.english: Can I have the check, please? Can I pay by card?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Of course! Would you like a receipt too?

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 네! 음식이 정말 맛있었어요. 또 올게요!
turns.english: Yes! The food was really delicious. We'll come back again!

situations.name: 상황 2 — 공항·비행기
situations.description: 🎭 🎭 👦 승객(아이) · 👩 공항 직원 · 👩‍✈️ 승무원 | 📖 체크인부터 착륙까지 전 과정

turns.speaker: 👦 승객
turns.korean: 실례합니다! 체크인 카운터가 어디예요? 길을 잃었어요.
turns.english: Excuse me! Where is the check-in counter? I'm lost.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Don't worry! It's over there. Let me guide you.

turns.speaker: 👦 승객
turns.korean: 체크인하고 싶어요. 여기 제 여권이랑 티켓이에요.
turns.english: I'd like to check in. Here is my passport and ticket.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 감사해요! 가방이 몇 개예요? 무게 제한이 있어요.
turns.english: Thank you! How many bags do you have? There is a weight limit.

turns.speaker: 👦 승객
turns.korean: 여행 가방 하나랑 작은 가방 하나예요.
turns.english: One suitcase and one small bag.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 창가 자리 드릴까요, 통로 쪽으로 드릴까요?
turns.english: Would you like a window seat or an aisle seat?

turns.speaker: 👦 승객
turns.english: A window seat, please! Is the flight delayed?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 아니요, 정시 출발이에요. 7번 게이트로 가세요. 복도 끝에 있어요!
turns.english: No, it's on time. Please go to Gate 7. It's at the end of the hallway!

turns.speaker: 👦 승객
turns.english: Thank you! (On the plane) Excuse me. Where is my seat?

turns.speaker: 👩‍✈️ 승무원
turns.english: It's seat 25A. Shall I put this bag in the overhead bin?

turns.speaker: 👦 승객
turns.korean: 네, 감사해요! 담요랑 베개 주실 수 있어요?
turns.english: Yes, thank you! Can I have a blanket and a pillow?

turns.speaker: 👩‍✈️ 승무원
turns.korean: 물론이죠! 비행시간은 약 두 시간이에요. 영화도 보실 수 있어요.
turns.english: Of course! The flight is about two hours. You can also watch movies.

turns.speaker: 👦 승객
turns.korean: 조금 어지럽고 배가 고파요. 물이랑 간식 주실 수 있어요?
turns.english: I feel a little dizzy and hungry. Can I have water and a snack?

turns.speaker: 👩‍✈️ 승무원
turns.korean: 네, 바로 드릴게요. 괜찮으세요? 안전벨트 매셨어요?
turns.english: Yes, right away. Are you okay? Is your seatbelt fastened?

turns.speaker: 👦 승객
turns.english: Yes, all done. Thank you!

turns.speaker: 👩‍✈️ 승무원 안
turns.english: We are landing soon. Please fasten your seatbelt!

turns.speaker: 👦 승객
turns.korean: (착륙 후) 짐 찾는 곳이 어디예요? 제 가방이 안 보여요!
turns.english: (After landing) Where is the baggage claim? I can't find my bag!

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 걱정하지 마세요! 분실물 센터로 가세요. 도와드릴게요.
turns.english: Don't worry! Please go to the lost and found. We'll help you.

turns.speaker: 👦 승객
turns.korean: 감사해요. 호텔까지 어떻게 가요? 버스 있나요? 얼마나 걸려요?
turns.english: Thank you. How do I get to the hotel? Is there a bus? How long does it take?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 1번 버스 타세요. 약 20분 걸려요. 안전한 여행 되세요!
turns.english: Take bus number 1. It takes about 20 minutes. Have a safe trip!

situations.name: 상황 3 — 쇼핑·마트
situations.description: 🎭 🎭 👦 손님(아이) · 👩 점원 | 📖 마트에서 물건 찾기, 옷 고르기, 계산, 반품까지

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.english: Excuse me! Where is the milk and cereal?

turns.speaker: 👩 점원
turns.korean: 우유는 3번 통로, 시리얼은 4번 통로에 있어요. 안내해 드릴까요?
turns.english: Milk is in aisle 3, cereal is in aisle 4. Would you like me to guide you?

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 감사해요! 이 우유 유통기한이 언제예요? 신선한가요?
turns.english: Thank you! When does this milk expire? Is it fresh?

turns.speaker: 👩 점원
turns.korean: 이번 주 금요일이에요. 아주 신선해요! 오늘 20% 세일이에요.
turns.english: This Friday. It's very fresh! And it's 20% off today.

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 잘됐네요! 두 개 주세요. 이 셔츠 입어봐도 되나요?
turns.english: Great! Give me two please. Can I try on this shirt?

turns.speaker: 👩 점원
turns.english: Of course! The fitting room is over there. What size are you?

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 잘 모르겠어요. 이게 너무 커요. 더 작은 사이즈랑 파란색 있어요?
turns.english: I'm not sure. This is too big. Do you have a smaller size and a blue one?

turns.speaker: 👩 점원
turns.english: Just a moment! I'll bring you a blue S size.

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 딱 맞아요! 이 색이 마음에 들어요. 이걸로 할게요.
turns.english: It fits perfectly! I like this color. I'll take this one.

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 선물용이에요? 친구 생일 선물이에요. 포장해 주실 수 있어요?
turns.english: Is it a gift? It's my friend's birthday present. Can you gift-wrap it?

turns.speaker: 👩 점원
turns.korean: 예쁘게 포장해 드릴게요! 이 쿠폰 사용할 수 있어요?
turns.english: I'll wrap it nicely! Can I use this coupon?

turns.speaker: 👩 점원
turns.english: Yes! That's a 1,000 won discount. Do you have a loyalty card?

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 아니요, 없어요. 카드로 계산해도 되나요? 전체 얼마예요?
turns.english: No, I don't. Can I pay by card? How much is the total?

turns.speaker: 👩 점원
turns.english: The total is 18,000 won. Would you like a receipt and a bag?

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.english: Yes, please. Thank you!

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: (다음 날) 저기요! 어제 산 장난감이 망가졌어요. 작동을 안 해요.
turns.english: (Next day) Excuse me! This toy I bought yesterday is broken. It doesn't work.

turns.speaker: 👩 점원
turns.korean: 정말 죄송해요! 영수증 있으세요? 교환해 드릴게요.
turns.english: I'm so sorry! Do you have the receipt? I'll exchange it for you.

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 네, 여기 있어요. 교환 대신 환불받을 수 있어요?
turns.english: Yes, here it is. Can I get a refund instead of an exchange?

turns.speaker: 👦 손님
turns.korean: 물론이죠! 그런데 이 장난감은 몇 살 용이에요? 어린이에게 안전한가요?
turns.english: Of course! By the way, what age is this toy for? Is it safe for children?

turns.speaker: 👩 점원
turns.korean: 6살 이상이에요. 완전히 안전해요! 감사합니다. 또 오세요!
turns.english: It's for ages 6 and up. It's completely safe! Thank you. Please come again!

situations.name: 상황 4 — 학교·교실
situations.description: 🎭 🎭 👦 학생(준호) · 👩‍🏫 선생님 · 👧 친구(민지) | 📖 등교부터 하교까지 하루 학교 생활

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.english: Good morning, everyone! How are you today?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 저는 아주 좋아요! 오늘 날씨가 정말 좋아요!
turns.english: I'm great! The weather is really nice today!

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.korean: 맞아요! 자, 새 친구가 왔어요. 자기소개 해볼까요?
turns.english: That's right! Now, we have a new friend. Shall we introduce ourselves?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 안녕하세요! 제 이름은 준호예요. 저는 10살이에요. 서울에 살아요.
turns.english: Hello! My name is Junho. I'm 10 years old. I live in Seoul.

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.english: Nice to meet you, Junho! What is your favorite subject?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 수학이랑 영어를 좋아해요! 영어 수업이 제일 재미있어요.
turns.english: I like math and English! English class is the most fun.

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.korean: 훌륭해요! 자, 책 10쪽을 펼쳐요. 잘 들으세요!
turns.english: Excellent! Okay, open your book to page 10. Listen carefully!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 선생님! 연필을 깜빡했어요. 연필 빌려도 될까요?
turns.english: Teacher! I forgot my pencil. Can I borrow a pencil?

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.english: Just this once! Did you do your homework?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 죄송해요, 숙제를 깜빡했어요. 내일 꼭 가져올게요.
turns.english: I'm sorry, I forgot my homework. I'll definitely bring it tomorrow.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 선생님, 이 단어 뜻을 모르겠어요. 다시 설명해 주실 수 있어요?
turns.english: Teacher, I don't know this word. Can you explain it again?

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.korean: 물론이죠! 더 천천히 말해드릴게요. 이제 이해했어요?
turns.english: Of course! I'll speak more slowly. Do you understand now?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Yes, I understand! Is this right?

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.korean: 거의 다 됐어요! 포기하지 말고 다시 해봐요.
turns.english: Almost! Don't give up and try again.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: (After trying again) Is this right this time?

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.korean: 완벽해요! 정말 잘했어요! 이제 쉬는 시간이에요!
turns.english: Perfect! You did a great job! It's recess time now!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: (민지에게) 안녕! 나랑 친구 해줄 수 있어? 같이 놀래?
turns.english: (To Minji) Hi! Can you be my friend? Do you want to play together?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 물론이지! 나는 민지야. 술래잡기 하자! 교대로 하자!
turns.english: Of course! I'm Minji. Let's play tag! Let's take turns!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 선생님, 오늘 수업이 정말 재미있었어요! 내일 봐요!
turns.english: Teacher, today's class was really fun! See you tomorrow!

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.korean: 고마워요! 잘 가요. 숙제 잊지 마세요! 좋은 하루 보내요!
turns.english: Thank you! Goodbye. Don't forget your homework! Have a good day!

situations.name: 상황 5 — 수업 시간 특별 대화
situations.description: 🎭 🎭 👦 준호 · 👧 민지 · 👩‍🏫 선생님 | 📖 짝 활동, 발표, 그룹 게임, 점심까지

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.english: Today is pair activity! Work in pairs.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: (민지에게) 나랑 같이 해도 돼? 나는 준호야.
turns.english: (To Minji) Can I work with you? I'm Junho.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 물론이지! 반가워, 준호. 우리 잘 해보자!
turns.english: Of course! Nice to meet you, Junho. Let's do a great job!

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.english: Read it out loud. Louder!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 선생님, 이 단어를 모르겠어요. 힌트 주실 수 있어요?
turns.english: Teacher, I don't know this word. Can you give me a hint?

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.english: It's a fruit. It's yellow and sweet!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I got it! It's "Banana"! Is that right?

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.korean: 맞아요! 훌륭해요! 발표할 사람 손 들어봐요.
turns.english: That's right! Excellent! Raise your hand if you want to present.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: (raising hand) Let me try! It's okay if I'm wrong, right?

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.english: Of course! It's okay to be wrong. What matters is trying!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: (After presenting) How did I do? Did I do well?

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.english: Perfect! Everyone give Junho a round of applause!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 선생님, 게임 해도 돼요? 빙고 게임 하고 싶어요!
turns.english: Teacher, can we play a game? We want to play Bingo!

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.korean: 좋아요! 네 명씩 그룹 지어요. 규칙 잘 들으세요!
turns.english: Good idea! Get into groups of four. Listen to the rules carefully!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: (게임 중) 그건 불공평해요! 교대로 해야 해요.
turns.english: (During the game) That's not fair! We need to take turns.

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.korean: 맞아요! 준호 말이 맞아요. 모두 교대로 하세요.
turns.english: That's right! Junho is correct. Everyone take turns.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: (게임 후) 이제 쉬는 시간! 배고파요. 오늘 점심 뭐예요?
turns.english: (After the game) It's recess now! I'm hungry. What's for lunch today?

turns.speaker: 👩‍🏫 선생님
turns.english: It's spaghetti and salad. It looks delicious, doesn't it?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: (민지에게) 같이 앉아도 돼? 오늘 정말 재미있었어!
turns.english: (To Minji) Can I sit with you? Today was really fun!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 물론이지! 내일도 같이 하자. 우리 최선을 다해봐!
turns.english: Of course! Let's do it together again tomorrow. Let's do our best!

situations.name: 상황 6 — 집에서
situations.description: 🎭 🎭 👦 아이(준호) · 👩 엄마 | 📖 아침 기상부터 잠자리까지 하루 집 생활

turns.speaker: 👩 엄마
turns.english: Wake up! It's morning! You'll be late for school!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 엄마... 아직 졸려요. 5분만 더 자면 안 돼요?
turns.english: Mom... I'm still sleepy. Can I sleep just 5 more minutes?

turns.speaker: 👩 엄마
turns.korean: 안 돼요! 어서 일어나요. 이 닦고, 세수하고, 옷 입어요!
turns.english: No! Get up now. Brush your teeth, wash your face, and get dressed!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 알겠어요. 엄마, 아침에 뭐 먹어요? 배고파요.
turns.english: Okay. Mom, what's for breakfast? I'm hungry.

turns.speaker: 👩 엄마
turns.korean: 달걀이랑 토스트예요! 어서 와서 먹어요. 우유도 마셔요.
turns.english: It's eggs and toast! Come and eat. Drink your milk too.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I don't like vegetables! Do I have to eat them?

turns.speaker: 👩 엄마
turns.korean: 네, 꼭 먹어야 해요! 건강에 아주 좋아요. 음식 가지고 놀지 마세요.
turns.english: Yes, you have to! They're very good for you. Don't play with your food.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 다 먹었어요. 학교 다녀와서 TV 봐도 돼요?
turns.english: I'm done eating. Can I watch TV when I get back from school?

turns.speaker: 👩 엄마
turns.korean: 숙제 먼저 하면요! TV에 너무 가까이 앉지 마세요.
turns.english: If you do your homework first! Don't sit too close to the TV.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: (하교 후) 엄마! 오늘 새 친구가 생겼어요. 집에 초대해도 돼요?
turns.english: (After school) Mom! I made a new friend today. Can I invite them over?

turns.speaker: 👩 엄마
turns.korean: 좋아요! 방 먼저 청소하고 장난감 정리해요.
turns.english: Sure! Clean your room and put your toys away first.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 엄마! 제일 좋아하는 장난감을 잃어버렸어요! 찾는 거 도와주세요!
turns.english: Mom! I lost my favorite toy! Please help me find it!

turns.speaker: 👩 엄마
turns.korean: 걱정하지 마세요. 침대 밑이랑 소파 뒤를 찾아봐요.
turns.english: Don't worry. Look under the bed and behind the sofa.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 찾았어요! 소파 뒤에 있었어요. 감사해요, 엄마!
turns.english: I found it! It was behind the sofa. Thank you, Mom!

turns.speaker: 👩 엄마
turns.english: Dinner is ready! Come in. It's spaghetti today!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 냄새가 정말 맛있어요! 엄마, 요리 도와드릴게요. 제가 저을게요!
turns.english: It smells so good! Mom, I'll help you cook. Let me stir it!

turns.speaker: 👩 엄마
turns.english: Be careful! It's hot. Thank you for helping!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: It's so delicious! Your cooking is the best, Mom!

turns.speaker: 👩 엄마
turns.korean: 이제 잘 시간이에요! 잠옷 입고 이 닦아요. 자기 전에 이야기 읽어줄게요.
turns.english: It's bedtime now! Put on your pajamas and brush your teeth. I'll read you a story before bed.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Okay! Good night, Mom. I love you!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hi! I'd like to check in.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: What is your name, please?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: My name is Kim Junho. I have a reservation.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: I found your reservation. That's two nights.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: That's right. Is a room upgrade possible?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 오늘은 여유가 있어서 무료 업그레이드 가능해요.
turns.english: We have availability today, so a free upgrade is possible.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Really? Thank you so much!

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Here is your key card. You're in room 305.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What time is check-out?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's 11 in the morning.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What is the Wi-Fi password?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's "hotel2024."

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Where can I have breakfast?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: At the 2nd floor restaurant, from 7 to 10.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is there a swimming pool?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's on the basement floor.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 짐을 잠깐 맡아 주실 수 있나요?
turns.english: Can you keep my luggage for a while?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Of course! I'll give you a luggage tag.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: You are very kind. Thank you.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: You're welcome! Have a pleasant stay!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Excuse me, are you available?

turns.speaker: 👨 기사
turns.english: Yes, get in! Where are you going?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Please take me to Myeongdong Station.

turns.speaker: 👨 기사
turns.english: Got it. It will take about 20 minutes.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How much will the fare be?

turns.speaker: 👨 기사
turns.english: About 15,000 won.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I pay by card?

turns.speaker: 👨 기사
turns.english: Yes, of course.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 에어컨 좀 켜 주실 수 있나요? 덥네요.
turns.english: Can you turn on the air conditioner? It's hot.

turns.speaker: 👨 기사
turns.english: Sure, it will cool down soon.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Please turn left here.

turns.speaker: 👨 기사
turns.english: Understood. Is it okay to follow the navigation?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Yes, that's fine.

turns.speaker: 👨 기사
turns.english: The traffic is heavy right now.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: That's okay. I have enough time.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Please stop in front of that convenience store.

turns.speaker: 👨 기사
turns.english: Got it. We're here!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Where is the card reader?

turns.speaker: 👨 기사
turns.english: Here it is. Please pay here.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Thank you! Drive safely!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Excuse me, does this subway stop at City Hall?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's two stops away.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Which line is it?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's Line 2.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Can I transfer here?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, you can transfer to Line 5.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Where can I recharge my transit card?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: You can do it at that ticket machine over there.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Is it faster by bus?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: The subway will be faster.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: There's a seat. May I sit here?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's empty.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: What is the next stop?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's Euljiro 3-ga Station.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Does this bus go to Incheon Airport?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, the last stop is Incheon Airport.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: How long does it take?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It takes about one hour and thirty minutes.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Really? Thank you!

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Have a great trip!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to open a bank account.

turns.speaker: 👩 행원
turns.english: Did you bring your passport?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Yes, here it is.

turns.speaker: 👩 행원
turns.english: What kind of account would you like?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: A regular savings account, please.

turns.speaker: 👩 행원
turns.english: Please fill out this form.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Do I sign here?

turns.speaker: 👩 행원
turns.korean: 네, 맞아요. 초기 입금액은 얼마로 하실 건가요?
turns.english: Yes, that's right. How much would you like to deposit initially?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'll start with 100 dollars.

turns.speaker: 👩 행원
turns.english: Got it. Would you also like a debit card?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Yes, please.

turns.speaker: 👩 행원
turns.english: You'll receive the card by mail in one week.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I also apply for online banking?

turns.speaker: 👩 행원
turns.english: Yes, just download our app.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is there a fee for using the ATM?

turns.speaker: 👩 행원
turns.english: Our own ATMs are free.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is it possible to send money overseas?

turns.speaker: 👩 행원
turns.english: Yes, you can do it online.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Everything is clear now. Thank you!

turns.speaker: 👩 행원
turns.english: You're welcome! Have a great day!

turns.speaker: 👩 의사
turns.english: Hello, what brings you in today?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I have a bad sore throat and a fever.

turns.speaker: 👩 의사
turns.english: When did it start?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Two days ago.

turns.speaker: 👩 의사
turns.english: Do you have any other symptoms?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I also have a headache and I'm coughing.

turns.speaker: 👩 의사
turns.english: Do you have any medicine allergies?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: No, I don't.

turns.speaker: 👩 의사
turns.english: Let me take your temperature. Please open your mouth.

turns.speaker: 👩 의사
turns.english: Your temperature is 38.5. It looks like the flu.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is it serious?

turns.speaker: 👩 의사
turns.korean: 아니요. 푹 쉬고 물 많이 마시면 돼요.
turns.english: No. Just rest well and drink plenty of water.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Will you prescribe medicine?

turns.speaker: 👩 의사
turns.english: Yes, I'll give you a three-day prescription.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How should I take the medicine?

turns.speaker: 👩 의사
turns.english: Three times a day, after meals.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: When should I come back?

turns.speaker: 👩 의사
turns.english: Come back if you don't feel better in three days.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I understand. Thank you.

turns.speaker: 👩 의사
turns.english: Get well soon!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Hello! Do you have any headache medicine?

turns.speaker: 👨 약사
turns.english: Yes, what kind would you like?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 처방전 없이 살 수 있는 것으로요.
turns.english: Something I can buy without a prescription.

turns.speaker: 👨 약사
turns.korean: 이 약을 추천해 드려요. 효과가 좋아요.
turns.english: I recommend this medicine. It works well.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: How do I take it?

turns.speaker: 👨 약사
turns.korean: 하루 두 번, 식사 후에 드세요.
turns.english: Take it twice a day, after meals.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Can children take it too?

turns.speaker: 👨 약사
turns.english: No, it's only for those 12 and older.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Then do you have medicine for children?

turns.speaker: 👨 약사
turns.english: Yes, please come this way.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: What flavor is this?

turns.speaker: 👨 약사
turns.english: It's strawberry flavor. Kids love it.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Are there any side effects?

turns.speaker: 👨 약사
turns.korean: 졸릴 수 있어요. 운전 시 주의하세요.
turns.english: You may feel drowsy. Be careful when driving.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I'll take both of these.

turns.speaker: 👨 약사
turns.english: That will be 15 dollars total.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Can I pay by card?

turns.speaker: 👨 약사
turns.english: Yes, of course.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Please give me a receipt.

turns.speaker: 👨 약사
turns.english: Get well soon!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to order.

turns.speaker: 👩 바리스타
turns.english: Welcome! What can I get for you?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: One Americano, please.

turns.speaker: 👩 바리스타
turns.english: Would you like it iced or hot?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Iced, please.

turns.speaker: 👩 바리스타
turns.english: What size would you like?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Large size, please.

turns.speaker: 👩 바리스타
turns.english: Would you like anything else?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Do you have cheesecake?

turns.speaker: 👩 바리스타
turns.english: Yes, it was freshly baked today.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I'll have one. My name is Minji.

turns.speaker: 👩 바리스타
turns.english: That's 8 dollars. Will you be eating here?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Yes, I'll eat here.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: What is the Wi-Fi password?

turns.speaker: 👩 바리스타
turns.english: It's "cafe1234." It's also written on the counter.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Where are the outlets?

turns.speaker: 👩 바리스타
turns.english: They're next to the window seats.

turns.speaker: 👩 바리스타
turns.english: We'll call your name when your order is ready.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Got it. Thank you!

turns.speaker: 👩 바리스타
turns.english: Enjoy your time here!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Excuse me! How much is the admission fee for this museum?

turns.speaker: 👩 안내원
turns.english: It's 15 dollars for adults and 8 dollars for children.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is there a student discount?

turns.speaker: 👩 안내원
turns.korean: 네, 학생증을 보여 주시면 10% 할인해 드려요.
turns.english: Yes, show your student ID and get a 10% discount.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is there also an audio guide?

turns.speaker: 👩 안내원
turns.english: Yes, Korean is supported too.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is photography allowed?

turns.speaker: 👩 안내원
turns.korean: 대부분의 전시물은 가능하지만, 빨간 표시 구역은 안 돼요.
turns.english: Most exhibits are fine, but not in the red-marked areas.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: When does the tour start?

turns.speaker: 👩 안내원
turns.english: It starts in 30 minutes.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is there a restroom nearby?

turns.speaker: 👩 안내원
turns.english: It's at the end of that hallway.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Where is the gift shop?

turns.speaker: 👩 안내원
turns.english: It's next to the exit.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 여기서 사진 찍어 주실 수 있나요?
turns.english: Can you take a picture of me here?

turns.speaker: 👩 안내원
turns.english: Of course! Say cheese!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: This is such a beautiful place!

turns.speaker: 👩 안내원
turns.english: Thank you. Please come again!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I get a map?

turns.speaker: 👩 안내원
turns.korean: 네, 여기 있어요. 즐거운 관람 되세요!
turns.english: Yes, here you go. Enjoy your visit!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to rent a car.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: How many days do you need it?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: For three days.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: What kind of car would you like?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: A small car is enough. Something economical.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: This Toyota Corolla is 45 dollars a day.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is insurance included?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 기본 보험은 포함돼 있어요. 풀 커버리지는 추가 비용이에요.
turns.english: Basic insurance is included. Full coverage costs extra.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'll go with full coverage.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Please give me your driver's license and credit card.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Here you go. It's an international driver's license.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I also rent a GPS navigation system?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's 5 dollars a day.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Please include that too.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How should I return the fuel?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 빌릴 때와 같은 수준으로 반납해 주세요.
turns.english: Please return it at the same level as when you rented.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Where do I return the car?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Please bring it to the airport rental center.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Here are the car key and the rental agreement.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Thank you! I'll drive safely!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello, Mr. Smith! It's great to meet you.

turns.speaker: 👩 스미스
turns.korean: 저도 만나서 반가워요, 준호 씨! 먼 길 오셨네요.
turns.english: Nice to meet you too, Junho! You came a long way.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 네, 어제 도착했어요. 도시가 정말 멋지네요.
turns.english: Yes, I arrived yesterday. The city is really amazing.

turns.speaker: 👩 스미스
turns.korean: 감사합니다! 먼저 커피 한 잔 드릴까요?
turns.english: Thank you! Can I offer you a coffee first?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Sure. Thank you.

turns.speaker: 👩 스미스
turns.korean: 오늘 미팅 목적이 무엇인지 시작해 볼까요?
turns.english: Shall we start with the purpose of today's meeting?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'd like to introduce our company's new product.

turns.speaker: 👩 스미스
turns.english: Do you have a presentation ready?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 네, 제 노트북에 있어요. 화면에 연결해도 될까요?
turns.english: Yes, it's on my laptop. May I connect it to the screen?

turns.speaker: 👩 스미스
turns.english: Of course. Here's the HDMI cable.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: This product has three key features.

turns.speaker: 👩 스미스
turns.korean: 첫 번째 특징이 가장 흥미롭네요! 더 설명해 주세요.
turns.english: The first feature is most interesting! Please explain more.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: This feature saves 30% of time.

turns.speaker: 👩 스미스
turns.english: Impressive! What is the price?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: We can offer a discount for bulk purchases.

turns.speaker: 👩 스미스
turns.korean: 다음 주까지 견적서를 보내줄 수 있나요?
turns.english: Can you send a quote by next week?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Of course. Shall we exchange business cards?

turns.speaker: 👩 스미스
turns.english: Yes, let me give you mine.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Today's meeting was really productive. Thank you!

turns.speaker: 👩 스미스
turns.english: Same here. I look forward to seeing you again soon!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello, is this ABC Hotel?

turns.speaker: 👩 수신자
turns.english: Yes, it is. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'd like to make a reservation.

turns.speaker: 👩 수신자
turns.english: What are the dates?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: From May 10th to May 13th.

turns.speaker: 👩 수신자
turns.english: Just a moment, let me check.

turns.speaker: 👩 수신자
turns.english: Yes, we have a room available on those dates.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How much is it per night?

turns.speaker: 👩 수신자
turns.english: It's 120 dollars including breakfast.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Great, I'd like to book it.

turns.speaker: 👩 수신자
turns.english: Please give me your name and contact number.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Kim Junho, and 010-1234-5678.

turns.speaker: 👩 수신자
turns.english: Can you pay a deposit by credit card?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Yes, shall I give you my card number?

turns.speaker: 👩 수신자
turns.english: Yes, please go ahead.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 예약 확인 이메일을 보내 주실 수 있나요?
turns.english: Can you send me a confirmation email?

turns.speaker: 👩 수신자
turns.english: Of course. What is your email address?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: It's junho@email.com.

turns.speaker: 👩 수신자
turns.english: Your reservation is complete!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Thank you. See you then!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to exchange dollars to euros.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Today's exchange rate is 0.92 euros per dollar.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: How much is the fee?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: It's 2% of the transaction amount.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I'd like to exchange 200 dollars.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Then you'll receive 180.48 euros.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Please give me large bills.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Shall I give you 50-euro bills?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Yes, that's fine.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Please show me your passport.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Here you go.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Please sign this document.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Should I sign here?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, that's right. Please wait a moment.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Here is 180.48 euros. Please count it.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: It's correct. Please give me a receipt too.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.korean: 여기 있어요. 오늘 환율이 좋은 편이에요.
turns.english: Here you go. Today's rate is quite good.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: That's good! Can you also exchange Korean won?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, of course. Please come again.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Thank you! I'll come again!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Excuse me! May I ask for directions?

turns.speaker: 👩 행인
turns.english: Of course! Where are you going?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I want to go to the Natural History Museum.

turns.speaker: 👩 행인
turns.english: It's about a 10-minute walk from here.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Which direction should I go?

turns.speaker: 👩 행인
turns.english: Turn right at that traffic light.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: And then?

turns.speaker: 👩 행인
turns.english: When you see the big park, turn left.

turns.speaker: 👩 행인
turns.english: The museum will be on your left side.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Would it be easier to take a bus?

turns.speaker: 👩 행인
turns.korean: 걸어가는 게 더 빨라요. 날씨도 좋고요.
turns.english: Walking is faster. Plus, the weather is nice.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I find it on a map app?

turns.speaker: 👩 행인
turns.english: Yes, search for "Natural History Museum."

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is there a cafe nearby?

turns.speaker: 👩 행인
turns.english: There's a Starbucks right next to the museum.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Perfect! You are very kind.

turns.speaker: 👩 행인
turns.korean: 천만에요. 혹시 길을 잃으면 다시 물어봐요.
turns.english: You're welcome. If you get lost, just ask again.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 감사합니다! 한 가지만 더 물어봐도 될까요?
turns.english: Thank you! May I ask one more thing?

turns.speaker: 👩 행인
turns.english: Of course!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 이 동네에서 꼭 가야 할 곳이 있나요?
turns.english: Is there a must-visit place in this neighborhood?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! I need help!

turns.speaker: 👩 신고센터
turns.english: What happened? Please stay calm and tell me.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 제 친구가 쓰러졌어요. 숨을 못 쉬는 것 같아요.
turns.english: My friend collapsed. I think they can't breathe.

turns.speaker: 👩 신고센터
turns.korean: 구급차를 바로 보낼게요. 지금 어디 있나요?
turns.english: I'll send an ambulance right away. Where are you now?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'm on 5th Avenue near Times Square.

turns.speaker: 👩 신고센터
turns.english: Got it. Is the patient conscious?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: No. There is no response.

turns.speaker: 👩 신고센터
turns.english: Do you know how to do CPR?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: A little. What should I do?

turns.speaker: 👩 신고센터
turns.english: Press firmly on the center of the chest.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Yes, I'm doing it now.

turns.speaker: 👩 신고센터
turns.english: The ambulance will arrive in 5 minutes. Keep going.

turns.speaker: 👩 신고센터
turns.english: Is there an AED nearby?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 저기 건물 안에 있는 것 같아요.
turns.english: I think there's one inside that building.

turns.speaker: 👩 신고센터
turns.english: Ask someone nearby to bring it.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 알겠어요! 저기요! AED 좀 가져와 주세요!
turns.english: Got it! Excuse me! Please bring the AED!

turns.speaker: 👩 신고센터
turns.korean: 잘 하고 있어요. 구급대원이 곧 도착해요.
turns.english: You're doing great. The paramedics will arrive soon.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I can see the ambulance!

turns.speaker: 👩 신고센터
turns.english: Wave your hand to show your location.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Yes! Thank you! I'm so relieved.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Hello! Are there tickets for "Spider-Man" today?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, there are showings at 3 PM and 7 PM.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Two tickets for the 3 o'clock showing, please.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Two adults?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: One adult and one child.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: How old is the child?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Eight years old.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Please select your seats. Would you like to see the screen?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I'd like seats in the middle.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: How about row G, seats 14 and 15?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Perfect! I'll take those.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: That's 22 dollars in total.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I'll pay by card.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Would you like to order popcorn?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 라지 팝콘 하나랑 콜라 두 개 주세요.
turns.english: One large popcorn and two colas, please.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Which theater number is it?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: It's theater 3. Take the elevator to the 2nd floor.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: How long are the ads before the movie?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: About 15 minutes.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Got it. Thank you! Enjoy the show.

turns.speaker: 👧 에밀리
turns.english: Hi! Thank you so much for coming!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Thanks for inviting me. What a great party!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: This is a small gift for you.

turns.speaker: 👧 에밀리
turns.english: Oh, thank you so much! I'll open it later.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Where are the drinks?

turns.speaker: 👧 에밀리
turns.english: They're on that table. Help yourself!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 안녕하세요! 처음 뵙는 것 같아요. 저는 준호예요.
turns.english: Hello! I don't think we've met. I'm Junho.

turns.speaker: 👩 참가자
turns.english: Hello! I'm Sam. I'm Emily's friend.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Where are you from?

turns.speaker: 👩 참가자
turns.english: I'm from Canada. How about you?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'm from Korea.

turns.speaker: 👩 참가자
turns.korean: 와, 정말요! 한국 음식을 정말 좋아해요!
turns.english: Wow, really! I love Korean food!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What Korean food do you like?

turns.speaker: 👩 참가자
turns.english: Kimchi stew and bulgogi!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 언제 한국에 오면 제가 안내해 드릴게요!
turns.english: When you come to Korea, I'll show you around!

turns.speaker: 👩 참가자
turns.english: Really? I'll definitely be in touch!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Shall we exchange contact information?

turns.speaker: 👩 참가자
turns.english: Sure! Let's connect on Instagram.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Today was really fun!

turns.speaker: 👩 참가자
turns.english: Me too! See you next time!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 안녕하세요! 이 소포를 한국에 보내고 싶어요.
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to send this package to Korea.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Please put it on the scale. I'll weigh it.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's 1.2 kilograms. How would you like to send it?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 How fast is the express option?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: EMS takes 3 to 5 days, regular airmail takes 10 to 14 days.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'll send it by EMS.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: What's inside?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Clothes and small gifts.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Please fill out the customs declaration form.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Do I write the list of contents here?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, please write the items and their prices too.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I track the delivery?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, EMS can be tracked online.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How much is the shipping cost?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's 35 dollars.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I also get insurance?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's an additional 5 dollars.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'll pay including that.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Here is your receipt and tracking number.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Thank you! I hope it arrives safely.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Hello! I have a reservation. It's Kim Minji.

turns.speaker: 👩 디자이너
turns.english: Welcome, Minji! Please sit here.

turns.speaker: 👩 디자이너
turns.english: What would you like today?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I'd like a haircut. Shoulder length, please.

turns.speaker: 👩 디자이너
turns.english: Shall I also cut the bangs?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Yes, please cut them above the eyebrows.

turns.speaker: 👩 디자이너
turns.english: Would you like coloring too?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes! Please make it brown.

turns.speaker: 👩 디자이너
turns.english: Light brown or dark brown?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Light brown, please.

turns.speaker: 👩 디자이너
turns.english: If you have a reference photo, please show me.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Please do it like this photo.

turns.speaker: 👩 디자이너
turns.korean: 예쁜 스타일이네요! 잘 어울릴 것 같아요.
turns.english: What a nice style! I think it will suit you well.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: How long will it take?

turns.speaker: 👩 디자이너
turns.english: About an hour and a half.

turns.speaker: 👩 디자이너
turns.english: Would you like a drink while you wait?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: A cup of coffee, please.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Wow, I look so much prettier!

turns.speaker: 👩 디자이너
turns.english: It suits you! Please come again.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Thank you! I'll come again next time.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to register as a member.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Welcome! What program are you interested in?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'd like to swim and use the gym.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 두 가지 다 포함된 콤보 회원권이 있어요.
turns.english: We have a combo membership that includes both.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How much is it per month?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's 80 dollars a month. You get a 10% discount for 3 months.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'll register for 3 months.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What are the pool hours?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: From 6 AM to 10 PM.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Are there swimming lessons?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, we have beginner, intermediate, and advanced classes.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'd like to register for the beginner class.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How many times a week are the classes?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Three times a week, on Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Saturdays.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I use the lockers?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's free for members.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I also borrow a towel?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, you can borrow one for 1 dollar.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 좋아요. 지금 바로 시작할 수 있나요?
turns.english: Great. Can I start right now?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes! Welcome. Work hard!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to take English classes.

turns.speaker: 👩 선생님
turns.english: Welcome! Shall we do a level test first?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Yes, sure. How does it work?

turns.speaker: 👩 선생님
turns.english: It's a short speaking and writing test. It takes 20 minutes.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Got it. Let's start!

turns.speaker: 👩 선생님
turns.english: Based on the test, you are at an intermediate level.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: When are the intermediate classes?

turns.speaker: 👩 선생님
turns.english: Monday, Wednesday, Friday evenings at 7:30.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How many students are in a class?

turns.speaker: 👩 선생님
turns.english: Maximum 8 students. It's a small, focused class.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What do we learn in class?

turns.speaker: 👩 선생님
turns.korean: 말하기, 듣기, 독해, 실전 회화를 배워요.
turns.english: We learn speaking, listening, reading, and real-life conversation.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How much is the monthly tuition?

turns.speaker: 👩 선생님
turns.english: 150 dollars a month. Textbook costs are separate.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: If I register, can I start right away?

turns.speaker: 👩 선생님
turns.korean: 네, 다음 주 월요일부터 시작할 수 있어요.
turns.english: Yes, you can start next Monday.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What happens if I'm absent?

turns.speaker: 👩 선생님
turns.english: We provide a recorded video.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'll register! I'm excited.

turns.speaker: 👩 선생님
turns.english: You'll do great! Let's work hard!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Excuse me, is seat 23B mine?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: Yes, it is. It's the window seat.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: When can I unfasten my seat belt?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: You can unfasten it when the seatbelt sign turns off.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 물 한 잔 받을 수 있을까요?
turns.english: Can I have a glass of water?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: Of course. Please wait a moment.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: When will the in-flight meal be served?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: In about one hour.

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.korean: 닭고기와 소고기 중 어떤 걸로 드릴까요?
turns.english: Would you like chicken or beef?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Chicken, please.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 에어컨이 너무 세요. 담요 주실 수 있나요?
turns.english: The air conditioner is too cold. Can I have a blanket?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: Yes, I'll bring it right away.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: 🇤🇸 My headphones are not working.

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: I'll replace them with new ones.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: How long until landing?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: About 2 hours left.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 입국 신고서 좀 받을 수 있나요?
turns.english: Can I get an immigration form?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: Yes, please fill it out in English.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Thank you. The flight is very comfortable.

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: Thank you! Have a pleasant flight!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! Is there an ATM nearby?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's next to that counter over there.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How much is this sandwich?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: It's 3.50 dollars.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can you heat it up in the microwave?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, 30 seconds is enough.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'll also take water and some snacks.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Do you need a bag?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Yes, please.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How much is everything?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: That's 7.20 dollars.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I pay by card?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, please tap your card here.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Do you have a points card?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: No, I don't.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I use the restroom?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's in the back. You'll need the key.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Please give me a receipt.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Here you go. Thank you!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Thank you! Have a nice day!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! Two admission tickets, please.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Two adults, or one adult and one child?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: One adult and one child. The child is 7 years old.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: The child is free! Adults are 30 dollars.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Really? Great! I'll pay by card.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 오늘 가장 인기 있는 놀이기구가 뭔가요?
turns.english: What is the most popular ride today?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: The roller coaster. But the wait time is 45 minutes.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can children ride it too?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: They must be at least 120cm tall.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 그럼 어린이가 탈 수 있는 건 뭐가 있나요?
turns.english: Then what rides can children enjoy?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 I recommend the merry-go-round and bumper cars.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What time is the parade?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: At 3 PM and 7 PM.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I get a map?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 네, 여기 있어요. 앱도 다운로드할 수 있어요.
turns.english: Yes, here you go. You can also download our app.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Are there lockers?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, they're at the entrance of Zone D.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What time does it close?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Today it closes at 10 PM.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Thank you! We'll have a great time!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Hello! I have a reservation for 2 PM.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: What is your name?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Kim Minji.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: What service would you like today?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I booked a 60-minute full body massage.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: How strong would you like the massage?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Medium pressure, please.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 특별히 신경 써야 할 부위가 있나요?
turns.english: Are there any areas that need special attention?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: My shoulders and back are very tense.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: What scent of oil do you prefer?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I like lavender scent.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Are there any ingredients you're allergic to?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: No, there aren't.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Please change in the dressing room.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Is there a robe?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's inside the dressing room.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: The massage feels so good!

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Shall I make it stronger or lighter?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: It's just right. Thank you.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 마사지 후 물 많이 드세요. 독소가 빠져요.
turns.english: Please drink plenty of water after the massage. It flushes toxins.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What time is the next train to New York?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's 2:30 PM. That's 30 minutes from now.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: One one-way ticket, please.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Would you like standard class or first class?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Standard class, please.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is there a window seat?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, 14A is available.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How much is it?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 It's 45 dollars.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is a round-trip ticket cheaper?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, round trip is 80 dollars.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Then I'll go with round trip.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Which platform does the train leave from?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Platform 3.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is there a luggage storage?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's in the basement of the main hall.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is there a dining car on the train?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's in car 5.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Thank you! I'd better hurry to not miss the train.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Have a great trip!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Hello! Is there a "Lion King" performance today?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, at 7:30 PM.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Are there any seats left?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, there are seats on the 2nd and 3rd floors.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Which seats are the best?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: The orchestra section is closest to the stage.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Are there 2 seats there?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 There are seats F-12 and F-13.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: How much is one ticket?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: 120 dollars.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I'll take 2 tickets.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: How long is the performance?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Two hours and 30 minutes, including intermission.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 공연 중 사진을 찍을 수 있나요?
turns.english: Can I take photos during the performance?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: I'm sorry, but photography is not allowed during the performance.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Can I bring food inside?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Only drinks are allowed. No food.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Can I buy a program booklet?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, they're sold in the lobby for 10 dollars.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I'm so excited! Thank you!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 실례합니다, 남성 정장 코너가 어디에 있나요?
turns.english: Excuse me, where is the men's suit section?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's on the 3rd floor. Please take the elevator.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 이 재킷이 마음에 드는데, 다른 색상도 있나요?
turns.english: I like this jacket. Do you have it in other colors?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, we have it in black, navy, and gray.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 My size is M. Do you have it?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Let me check. Yes, we have it.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I try it on?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Of course. The fitting room is over there.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: This fits perfectly! How much is it?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: The original price is 150 dollars, but it's 20% off now.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: So it's 120 dollars. I'll take it.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is gift wrapping available?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's free of charge.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is tax-free shopping available?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Please bring your passport.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What is the exchange or refund policy?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Within 30 days with a receipt.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I earn points?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: If you have a membership card, yes.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Thank you. Shopping was enjoyable!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! May I take a seat for the interview?

turns.speaker: 👩 면접관
turns.english: Yes, please sit down. Thank you for coming today.

turns.speaker: 👩 면접관
turns.english: Please introduce yourself first.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 저는 김준호이고, 마케팅 분야에서 3년 경력이 있어요.
turns.english: I'm Kim Junho and I have 3 years of experience in marketing.

turns.speaker: 👩 면접관
turns.english: Why did you apply for this position?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 귀사의 성장 가능성과 가치관이 저와 잘 맞아서요.
turns.english: Your company's growth potential and values align well with mine.

turns.speaker: 👩 면접관
turns.english: 🇤🇸 What is your greatest strength?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 저는 문제 해결 능력과 팀워크가 강점이에요.
turns.english: My strengths are problem-solving skills and teamwork.

turns.speaker: 👩 면접관
turns.english: What are your weaknesses?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I tend to be a perfectionist, and I'm working on improving it.

turns.speaker: 👩 면접관
turns.korean: 이전 직장에서 가장 큰 성과가 뭔가요?
turns.english: What was your biggest achievement at your previous job?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I increased sales by 30% through an SNS campaign.

turns.speaker: 👩 면접관
turns.english: What is your goal in 5 years?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 마케팅 팀장이 되어 회사에 기여하고 싶어요.
turns.english: I'd like to become a marketing team leader and contribute to the company.

turns.speaker: 👩 면접관
turns.english: What is your desired salary?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'd like to discuss it considering my experience.

turns.speaker: 👩 면접관
turns.english: When can you start?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I can start in two weeks.

turns.speaker: 👩 면접관
turns.english: Do you have any questions?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 팀 문화에 대해 더 알고 싶어요.
turns.english: I'd like to know more about the team culture.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I rent a beach umbrella?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's 10 dollars a day. Includes a sun bed.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Great. I'll rent two.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I also rent a surfboard?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, it's 15 dollars per hour.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Are there surfing lessons?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, beginner lessons start at 10 AM.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is it safe to swim here?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's safe inside the red flags.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Are the waves high?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: They're calm today. Good for swimming.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is there a shower?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, at the end of the beach. It's free.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I forgot sunscreen. Do you sell it?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, it's sold at that snack bar over there.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 파도가 갑자기 높아지면 어떻게 해야 하나요?
turns.english: What should I do if the waves suddenly get high?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 바로 물 밖으로 나오세요. 경고 방송이 나와요.
turns.english: Please get out of the water immediately. There will be an announcement.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Where are the lifeguards?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: They are stationed every 100 meters.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What a perfect beach! I'll have a great time!

turns.speaker: 👨 심사관
turns.english: Please show me your passport.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Yes, here it is.

turns.speaker: 👨 심사관
turns.english: What is the purpose of your visit?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Tourism.

turns.speaker: 👨 심사관
turns.english: How long do you plan to stay?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: For two weeks.

turns.speaker: 👨 심사관
turns.english: Where will you be staying?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: 🇤🇸 The Hilton Hotel in Manhattan.

turns.speaker: 👨 심사관
turns.english: How much money are you bringing?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: About 2,000 dollars in cash and a credit card.

turns.speaker: 👨 심사관
turns.english: Do you have anything to declare?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: No, I don't.

turns.speaker: 👨 심사관
turns.english: Is this your first time in the US?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: No, I came once two years ago.

turns.speaker: 👨 심사관
turns.english: Do you plan to work in this country?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: No, I'll only be sightseeing.

turns.speaker: 👨 심사관
turns.english: Do you have a return flight ticket?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Yes, here it is.

turns.speaker: 👨 심사관
turns.korean: 입국 허가가 됐습니다. 즐거운 여행 되세요!
turns.english: Entry is approved. Have a great trip!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Thank you!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to buy a new smartphone.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: What brand would you like?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 아이폰이랑 삼성 중에 어떤 게 더 좋아요?
turns.english: Between iPhone and Samsung, which is better?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 사용 목적에 따라 달라요. 주로 뭘 하실 건가요?
turns.english: It depends on your needs. What will you mainly use it for?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I love taking photos.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 그러면 아이폰 15 Pro를 추천해요. 카메라가 훌륭해요.
turns.english: Then I recommend the iPhone 15 Pro. The camera is excellent.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How much is it?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's 999 dollars. Installment payments are also available.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I also buy a local SIM card?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, we have several plans.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How much is 10GB of data per month?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: There's a 30-dollar plan. Calls are included.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I transfer my existing number?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, I'll need your previous carrier information.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 보호 케이스와 화면 보호 필름도 있나요?
turns.english: Do you also have a protective case and screen protector?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, we have a variety.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What is the warranty period?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: One year manufacturer warranty. Extension is also available.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Great. I'll buy everything together.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Great choice! Enjoy using it.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Excuse me, I have a peanut allergy.

turns.speaker: 👨 웨이터
turns.korean: 알겠습니다. 메뉴에서 알레르기 정보를 확인해 드릴게요.
turns.english: I understand. I'll check the allergen information in the menu.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Does this pasta contain peanuts?

turns.speaker: 👨 웨이터
turns.english: No, it doesn't. Please don't worry.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I'm a vegetarian. Do you have a vegetarian menu?

turns.speaker: 👨 웨이터
turns.english: Yes, we have three vegetarian dishes.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Does this salad dressing contain dairy?

turns.speaker: 👨 웨이터
turns.korean: 네, 치즈가 들어가요. 빼드릴 수 있어요.
turns.english: Yes, it contains cheese. We can remove it.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Yes, please. And please remove sugar too.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Are there gluten-free options?

turns.speaker: 👨 웨이터
turns.korean: 네, 파스타를 글루텐 프리 면으로 바꿀 수 있어요.
turns.english: Yes, we can change the pasta to gluten-free noodles.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Please do that. Thank you.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 소금을 적게 넣어 주실 수 있나요?
turns.english: Can you use less salt?

turns.speaker: 👨 웨이터
turns.english: Of course. You're health-conscious.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I have a child. Is there a children's menu?

turns.speaker: 👨 웨이터
turns.english: Yes, we have a separate children's menu.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Is the food spicy?

turns.speaker: 👨 웨이터
turns.english: It's slightly spicy. I'll make it less spicy for you.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Thank you so much for being so considerate.

turns.speaker: 👨 웨이터
turns.english: Of course! Enjoy your meal!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! Where does the check-in take place?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.korean: A터미널에서 하시면 돼요. 여권과 예약 확인서 가져오세요.
turns.english: Please go to Terminal A. Bring your passport and booking confirmation.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What is my cabin number?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: Cabin 248. It's on deck 2.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What time does the onboard restaurant open?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: Breakfast at 7, lunch at 12, dinner at 6.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 뷔페와 레스토랑 중 어떤 게 있나요?
turns.english: What options are there, buffet or restaurant?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.korean: 둘 다 있어요. 레스토랑은 예약이 필요해요.
turns.english: Both. The restaurant requires a reservation.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I'd like to sign up for a shore excursion.

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: Please reserve at the information center.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is there a pool and spa?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: Yes, they're on deck 9.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: When is the emergency drill?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: One hour after departure. Participation is mandatory.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is Wi-Fi available on board?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: Yes, it's paid. 15 dollars per day.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Can I use onboard currency?

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.korean: 네, 카드키가 선내 결제 카드 역할도 해요.
turns.english: Yes, your key card also serves as an onboard payment card.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What a wonderful cruise! I'm excited.

turns.speaker: 👩 승무원
turns.english: Have a wonderful cruise!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to get personal training.

turns.speaker: 👩 트레이너
turns.english: Great! What is your fitness goal?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I want to build muscle and lose weight.

turns.speaker: 👩 트레이너
turns.english: Do you have any workout experience?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: I only know the basics. I'm a beginner.

turns.speaker: 👩 트레이너
turns.english: Let's start with a body composition test.

turns.speaker: 👩 트레이너
turns.english: Your body fat is 25%. You're within the healthy range.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How many times a week should I work out?

turns.speaker: 👩 트레이너
turns.english: I recommend 3 to 4 times a week at first.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Which exercises should I do first?

turns.speaker: 👩 트레이너
turns.korean: 준비 운동 후 기본 웨이트 트레이닝이에요.
turns.english: After warm-up, basic weight training.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 무릎이 좀 약해요. 주의해야 할 게 있나요?
turns.english: My knees are a bit weak. Is there anything to be careful of?

turns.speaker: 👩 트레이너
turns.korean: 스쿼트할 때 무릎이 발끝을 넘지 않게 하세요.
turns.english: When squatting, don't let your knees go past your toes.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Is nutrition management also important?

turns.speaker: 👩 트레이너
turns.korean: 매우 중요해요. 운동 후 단백질을 드세요.
turns.english: Very important. Please eat protein after working out.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Should I also drink protein shakes?

turns.speaker: 👩 트레이너
turns.korean: 선택이에요. 음식으로 충분히 보충할 수 있어요.
turns.english: It's optional. You can supplement enough through food.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Today is my first workout. Please cheer me on!

turns.speaker: 👩 트레이너
turns.english: You can do it! Let's go!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Thank you! I'll work hard!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to rent ski equipment.

turns.speaker: 👨 강사
turns.english: What is your shoe size?

turns.speaker: 👨 강사
turns.english: Are you a beginner or experienced?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: It's my first time. Can I take a lesson?

turns.speaker: 👨 강사
turns.korean: 네, 그룹 레슨과 개인 레슨이 있어요.
turns.english: Yes, we have group and private lessons.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: How much is the group lesson?

turns.speaker: 👨 강사
turns.english: 50 dollars for 2 hours.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Is a helmet mandatory?

turns.speaker: 👨 강사
turns.english: We strongly recommend it. You can borrow one for free.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Where is the beginner slope?

turns.speaker: 👨 강사
turns.english: The green-marked slopes are for beginners.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Where do I buy a lift pass?

turns.speaker: 👨 강사
turns.english: You can buy it on the 1st floor of the main building.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Are the snow conditions good today?

turns.speaker: 👨 강사
turns.korean: 네! 어제 새 눈이 내려서 아주 좋아요.
turns.english: Yes! It snowed yesterday, so the conditions are excellent.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: What should I do if I fall?

turns.speaker: 👨 강사
turns.korean: 손을 먼저 짚지 말고 옆으로 쓰러지세요.
turns.english: Don't put your hands out first. Fall to the side.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: I understand. I'll learn hard!

turns.speaker: 👨 강사
turns.korean: 잘 하실 거예요! 즐거운 스키 되세요!
turns.english: You'll do great! Have fun skiing!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! I'm here to register as an exchange student.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Welcome! Where are you from?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 한국에서 왔어요. 한 학기 동안 공부할 거예요.
turns.english: I'm from Korea. I'll be studying for one semester.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 입학 허가서와 학생 비자를 보여 주세요.
turns.english: Please show me your admission letter and student visa.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Here they are.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: I'll make your student ID card.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 기숙사 신청도 여기서 할 수 있나요?
turns.english: Can I also apply for a dormitory here?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: No, you need to go to the housing office.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: How do I register for classes?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: You can do it on the online portal.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: What classes are popular?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Business and computer science are popular.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Where is the library?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's in the center of campus. Shall I give you a map?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Yes, please. Is there also a student cafeteria?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 네, B동 지하에 있어요. 저렴하고 맛있어요.
turns.english: Yes, it's in the basement of Building B. It's affordable and good.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: When is the exchange student orientation?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Next Monday at 10 AM.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 모르는 게 있으면 다시 와도 되나요?
turns.english: Can I come back if I have questions?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Come anytime! You're welcome!

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to print 10 copies of this document.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Black and white or color?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Black and white, please.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: What paper size? Shall I do A4?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.korean: 네, A4로 해주세요. 양면 인쇄도 가능한가요?
turns.english: Yes, A4 please. Is double-sided printing possible?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, it is. Shall I do double-sided?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Yes, please. And please staple them.

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Could you send the file by email?

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: It's on a USB. Can I plug it in here?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: Yes, please plug it into that computer.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: Can I also print photos?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, we have a dedicated photo printer.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: 🇤🇸 How much is it to print 20 4x6 photos?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 50 cents per photo. That's 10 dollars total.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: 🇤🇸 How much is the document printing?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Black and white single-sided is 10 cents per page.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: 🇤🇸 How long will it take?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 About 5 minutes.

turns.speaker: 👧 민지
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Can you also do binding?

turns.speaker: 👨 직원
turns.korean: 네, 스프링 제본과 일반 제본이 있어요.
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, we have spiral binding and regular binding.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 안녕하세요! 오늘 야구 경기 티켓 있나요?
turns.english: Hello! Are there tickets for today's baseball game?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: Yes, we have outfield and infield seats.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Two infield tickets, please.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: It's 35 dollars per ticket.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 What time does the game start?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 7 PM. Please enter 30 minutes before.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Can I wear my favorite team's uniform?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Of course! Cheering items are also allowed.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Can I bring food?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 음료는 가능하지만 외부 음식은 안 돼요.
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Drinks are fine, but outside food is not allowed.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Is there food sold inside the stadium?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Lots of options: hot dogs, popcorn, beer, and more.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Can I get a player's autograph?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 사인 이벤트는 경기 시작 1시간 전에 있어요.
turns.english: 🇤🇸 The autograph event is one hour before the game.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Is there a souvenir shop?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, it's next to the main entrance.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Are there accessible seats?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, they're separately provided on the 1st floor.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 I'm excited for today's game!

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Enjoy the game!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! One draft beer, please.

turns.speaker: 👨 바텐더
turns.korean: 어떤 맥주를 드릴까요? 여러 종류가 있어요.
turns.english: Which beer would you like? We have several types.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Please give me the most popular one.

turns.speaker: 👨 바텐더
turns.korean: IPA가 인기 있어요. 드라이하고 홉 향이 강해요.
turns.english: IPA is popular. It's dry with a strong hop flavor.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Great. I'll have that.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Do you have any snacks?

turns.speaker: 👨 바텐더
turns.korean: 네, 감자튀김, 나초, 치킨 윙이 있어요.
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, we have fries, nachos, and chicken wings.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 I'll order chicken wings.

turns.speaker: 👨 바텐더
turns.korean: 매운 맛, 순한 맛 중 어떤 거요?
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Spicy or mild?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Spicy, please.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 친구가 4명 더 올 건데 자리를 예약할 수 있나요?
turns.english: 🇤🇸 4 more friends are coming. Can I reserve seats?

turns.speaker: 👨 바텐더
turns.korean: 네, 저쪽 큰 테이블로 안내해 드릴게요.
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, I'll guide you to that big table over there.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Are you showing the live game today?

turns.speaker: 👨 바텐더
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, there's a live soccer match at 9.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Is there a cocktail menu?

turns.speaker: 👨 바텐더
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, we have a variety. Shall I bring you the menu?

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Are there non-alcoholic drinks?

turns.speaker: 👨 바텐더
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, we have mocktails and juices too.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Can I pay all at once at the end?

turns.speaker: 👨 바텐더
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, I'll open a tab for you.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: Hello! I'd like to book a helicopter tour.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Which course would you like? We have 30 minutes and 60 minutes.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 How much is the 60-minute one?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 It's 200 dollars per person.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 How many people can ride at once?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Maximum 4 people.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 What can we see?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 도심 전경과 해안선을 볼 수 있어요.
turns.english: 🇤🇸 You can see the city skyline and the coastline.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 What happens if the weather is bad?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 We'll cancel and give a full refund.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Can I take photos?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, both cameras and phones are allowed.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Is it scary?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 A little thrilling, but most people enjoy it!

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.korean: 이번 주 토요일 오전 10시 예약할 수 있나요?
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Can I book this Saturday at 10 AM?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Yes, it's available. Please give me your name and contact number.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Is there anything I need to do in advance?

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.korean: 편한 옷 입고, 10분 전에 도착해 주세요.
turns.english: 🇤🇸 Wear comfortable clothes and arrive 10 minutes early.

turns.speaker: 👦 준호
turns.english: 🇤🇸 I'm really excited! Thank you.

turns.speaker: 👩 직원
turns.english: 🇤🇸 You'll have a great time!
